message:
refactor: apply clippy suggestions, rename resolve_source_attachment_path, update callers

- system_health: use struct-init sugar, clone_from, write! over format!,
  simplify match arms, extract saturating_duration_ms_u64 helper, take
  references instead of Arc clones in diagnostics_worker_loop
- storage: rename resolve_source_attachment_path → resolve_attachment_source_path
  and make it pub; update process_markdown_images to pass base_dir
- benchmarks: update process_markdown_images call sites to pass base_dir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
